titleStmt.title: SII 41.87: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 87. (A.R. No. 86 of 1905.) Tiruttarakōsamaṅgai, Ramnad Taluk, Ramnad District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa of the Maṅgalēśvara temple at Tiruttarakōsamaṅgai.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya, M. Vīra-pāṇḍya, Year 2+12, Śaka 1355 Dhanu, Purva 7, Wednesday, Hasta = 1433 A.D.

summary.p: Records that the king gifted all taxes from the village of Puṟkuḷam in Chembi-nāḍu to a brāhmaṇa of Maruṅgūr alias Paṇḍitachōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Muttūṟṟu-kūṟṟam. It is specified that the gift village also included the untouchable slaves (tīṇḍā-aḍimai) of the outer chēri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakāptam 1000 3 100 5 10 5ṉ mel śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu
vaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiya tevaṟkuyāṇṭu 2 vatu Etir[ 10 2 vatu] mi
dhunanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyum budhan kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ muttū
ṟṟukkūṟṟattu brahmadeśam maruṅkūrāṉa paṇṭitacoḻa ccaturvvemaṅkalattu
mutgalagotrattu Āślāyana sūtrattu nārāyaṇaśarmman vīrapāṇṭi
yatēvaṉukku taṉakku nammuṭaiya perk kūlikku cempināṭ
ṭil nammuṭaiya Uḻavu paṟṟāṉa puṟkuḷam Uṭpaṭṭa pa
ṟṟum Ivvūril puṟañcēriyil tiṇṭā Aṭimai Uḷḷatum
Udakaburvadharmmadānamāka nām tarukaiyil Ivvūrkku Ellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟkellai nal
lāṉkuṭikkum Aṟukukuṭikkum meṟku teṉpāṟkellai kaṭampaṅkuṭikku vaṭa
kku melpāṟkellai vaṭavālaṅkuḷattukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai paṉaikkuḷattu
kkum Iyaṟkaikuṭikālukkum teṟkum Āka Ipperu nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa pa
ṟṟu maṉaitiṭal Ūruṇi Uṭaippukuḷam kuḷapparappu naṉcey puṉcey meṉokkiya
maram kiṇokkiya kiṇaṟu tiṇṭā Aṭimai maṟṟum Eṟperpaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷum
kaṭamai viniyokañ cekkiṟai taṟikkaṭamai taṭṭolipāṭṭam māvaṭai maravaṭai
pañcupili cantivikkiṟakappeṟu mutalāka Epperpaṭṭavaiyum sarvamānyamāka nam variyilār kaṇak
kilum patiṉoṉṟāvatu mutalukku kaḻitta Aḷavukku Immariyātiyile Intanāḷ mutalukku vanta sa
rvadharmmadānamāka Ācandratāravaṟ san=tatipraveśamedānāviniyoga vikrayaṅkaḷukku Urittāka kalli
lum cempilum veṭṭi kaiyyāṇṭu koḷḷavum Inta Udagapurvadharmma dānattukku nammuṭaiya vakai
yiluḷḷārilum maṟṟum Āṟākilum vikkiṉañ ceyiṟa Avarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyile brahmahattiyum
go(va)hattiyum ceyta pāvattaiyeytakkaṭavārkaḷākavum ..
Digital edition of SII 41.87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
